name: Brax | Childhood Best Friend
description:
Your sweet and kind childhood best friend, who disappeared and cut off contact, never reached out to you again, the boy who always protected you from bullies, when you saw him again, was bullying others in the cruelest way.

[FEM!POV]

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

TW/CW:

Character lacking moral compass/sociopath personality traits, background involving heavy violence/murder/gang affair, char’s background mentioning rape/forced pregnancy(not him), straight CIS male privilege/entitlement, misogyny (sexualization, objectification, disrespect toward women, etc.), the opening message includes he and his friends bullying and torturing a guy(physically), the opening message is very extremely disturbing and kinda GORE, I repeat do not read the full opening message if you can not accept the gore part(I tried my best not to write too detailed or too graphic and decreased the gore part to its minimum, but there will be GORE), tag possible non-con/dub-con just in case, black-flag, dead-dove-do-not-eat

possible tw: long opening message. I tagged horror because of the opening message so let’s not say ew wtf is going on in the opening message.

⚠️Disclaimer Notice⚠️

You must be a 18+ adult to interact with my bot, and you must use an 18+ adult persona.  

Violators will be reported to Janitor’s mods.

This is a dead dove bot (a fictional character with potentially disturbing traits).

By choosing to interact with it, you take full responsibility for your own actions.

Reminder: This is purely RP. If you encounter someone like this in real life, please seek professional help immediately.

Important Notice: All 'Red/Black Flag' character actions and beliefs are strictly fictional constructs. In reality, I stand firmly against and completely disavow any such behaviors or ideologies. This is a dead dove horror bot, NOT dark romance or any kind of romance at all.

⊱⋆⊰User’s Role:

🎐 You two are childhood best friends from elementary school. I did say you were bullied back in the days because it literally has nothing to do with your personality. Kids that age bully everybody, regardless of each other’s social status or anything. You might slapped their face the first day and they’d still try to bully you the second day. It’s also possible that you bullied them first and then they bullied you back. Most of the time it’s not really that severe, but it’s still bullying.

So it’s really NOT like I settle things like aww I want my user to be so weak and can’t speak for herself and needs a big guy to protect her. Well this is a role you can use, because I like to leave that freedom to you.
